name: milvus-rag
description: General-purpose agentic RAG plugin — attach any Milvus collection to Codex as a live document corpus.

interface.shortDescription: Turn any Milvus collection into a Codex research tool
interface.longDescription: General-purpose agentic RAG plugin. Attach a running Milvus collection to Codex as a live document corpus and let the agent explore it with five tools mirroring the Glob / Grep / Read affordances Codex already understands: Browse (name-glob docs), Search (regex over page text), Study (read a page range), Coverage (cross-doc hit-count sanity check), Preview (first-page identification). Works with any Milvus schema that carries doc / page / raw_text fields; RETRIEVAL_CORE_FIELD_* env vars remap column names when your schema differs.
